---
title: "Charlotte Mary Yonge - Contemporary Novels"
slug: "contemporary"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


[Castle Builders](castle_builders.qmd)  
[Abbey Church](abbey_church.qmd)  
[My Young Alcides](my_young_alcides.qmd)  
[Pillars of the House](pillars_of_the_house.qmd)  
[Clever Woman of the Family](clever_woman_of_the_family.qmd)  
[Countess Kate](countess_kate.qmd)  
[Hope and Fears](hopes_fears.qmd)  
[Heir of Redclyffe](heir_of_redclyffe.qmd)

NOTE  We now have summaries and related information for far more of CMY's works.  
[Click here to see the current All Works lists with links](all_works.qmd).
